entries.clue: A sequence of pitches heard as a line
entries.note: Melody is the horizontal aspect of music.
Tempo is usually measured in beats per minute.
A fugue develops a subject through overlapping voices.
Sonata can name both a genre and a formal design.

entries.clue: Based on modes rather than major/minor tonality
entries.note: Modal music draws on scales such as Dorian, Phrygian, and Mixolydian.
Timbre is what makes a violin and flute sound different on the same pitch.
